model._hint: Base: stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0. LoRA: sWizad/pokemon-trainer-sprite-pixelart (pk_trainer_xl_v1.safetensors, trained on upscaled 96×96 sprites). ~6 GB SDXL + LoRA; sequential_cpu_offload recommended on ≤16 GB.

lora._hint: 1.0 = full sprite style. Lower (0.8–0.9) blends trainer features with base SDXL.

generation._hint: 30 steps per official example code. | CFG 7.5 per official diffusers example. Range: 5–9. | 768×768 recommended per model card. For authentic sprites: downscale the output by 8× to 96×96 in any image editor.

system._hint: ~6 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: enabled (required for large models)

notes.about: Generates Pokémon-style trainer character sprites upscaled to 768×768 from the original 96×96 training resolution. Captures the look of classic Game Boy and GBC Pokémon trainer sprites.
notes.prompt_guide: No trigger word needed. Optional style tags: 'gen1' (Game Boy palette) or 'gen2' (GBC palette). Known trainer names: Ash, Bruno, and others from the games. Add 'simple background' or 'white background' to keep focus on the sprite. Examples: 'a female trainer in a red hat, gen1', 'Ash, pokemon trainer, white background', 'a warrior character, pixel art sprite, gen2 palette'.
